product_overview: Public-facing Next.js landing site showcasing West Edmonton Mall attractions, districts, events and retail, with a contact flow for sponsorship and leasing inquiries.
core_goals: Discover major attractions, events and retail offerings of the mall
Explore the mall vision and district experiences through immersive visuals
Quickly navigate between major site sections (Overview, Attractions, Events, Retail, Sponsorships)
Evaluate high-level mall statistics and district highlights
Submit availability or sponsorship inquiries using the front-end availability form

features.name: Global Navigation
features.description: Cinematic global menu that lets users open site navigation and jump to main site sections.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click hamburger menu icon to open navigation -> Click navigation link to /overview -> See /overview content
Navigate to / -> Click hamburger menu icon to open navigation -> Click navigation link to /attractions -> See /attractions content

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: Full-screen hero with background imagery and prominent headline to orient users and surface primary CTAs.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See full-screen hero section with background image and headline
Navigate to / -> See full-screen hero section with background image and headline -> Hover primary call-to-action -> Observe hover scale animation

features.name: Hero CTA Button Interactions
features.description: Primary and secondary call-to-action behaviors (hover/active states) for immediate exploration.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Hover primary call-to-action -> Observe scale-up on hover and scale-down on active
Navigate to / -> Hover secondary call-to-action -> Observe border and background color transition on hover -> Click secondary call-to-action -> See /retail content

features.name: Global Scroll & Progress Indicator
features.description: Fixed progress bar that indicates page scroll position and remains visible above content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down the page -> See fixed progress bar at top of the screen above content

features.name: Statistics Grid
features.description: Responsive stats section that shows primary mall metrics in a grid that adapts across viewports.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to stats section -> See the four primary statistics displayed
Navigate to / -> Resize viewport to mobile width -> Scroll to stats section -> See stats layout in single-column format

features.name: The Vision Section
features.description: Visual presentation of the mall vision with an interactive architectural image that reveals color on hover.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to The Vision section -> See grayscale architectural image and supporting copy
Navigate to / -> Scroll to The Vision section -> Hover the architectural image -> Observe transition from grayscale to color and slight scale-up

features.name: The Districts Section
features.description: Showcase of district cards (Europa Boulevard, Bourbon Street, Chinatown) with responsive layout and hover emphasis.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to The Districts section -> See three district cards laid out side-by-side on desktop or stacked on mobile
Navigate to / -> Scroll to The Districts section -> Hover a district card -> Observe image opacity increase and brightening

features.name: Availability / Claim Your Place Form
features.description: Front-end availability form for leasing or sponsorship inquiries allowing users to submit company details and requirements.
user_flows: Navigate to /sponsorships -> Scroll to Claim Your Place availability section -> Fill company name -> Select requirement from dropdown -> Fill contact details -> Submit form -> See submission acknowledgement or confirmation UI
Navigate to /sponsorships -> Scroll to Claim Your Place availability section -> Leave required fields empty -> Submit form -> See client-side validation errors for required fields

features.name: Footer and Site Links
features.description: Footer with category links and responsive layout that collapses on small screens.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to bottom of the page -> Hover footer category links -> Observe link color transition
Navigate to / -> Resize viewport to mobile width -> Scroll to bottom of the page -> See footer collapse into single-column layout

features.name: Browse Events and Retail
features.description: Pages that let users inspect events and retail directory content for planning and discovery.
user_flows: Navigate to /events -> See events page content and venue listings
Navigate to /retail -> See retail directory and shopping information

features.name: Global Navigation
features.description: Main cinematic menu navigation linking pages
user_interactions: Click hamburger menu icon to open navigation

features.name: Availability Form Submission
features.description: Form for sponsors or event planners to inquire availability
